content:
# Withdrawal Efficiency

**Summary**: A measure of the ability of a rock to release non-wetting fluids.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1991-ali|Ali, 1991]] evaluated withdrawal-efficiency to assess the ease of producing fluids from the pore system.

## Scientific Context

- [[1991-ali|Ali, 1991]] Indicates how much non-wetting fluid is trapped in the pore system.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1991-ali|Ali, 1991]] calculated from injection and withdrawal curves.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- No correlation was found between permeability and withdrawal efficiency for sandstone samples. ([[1991-ali|Ali, 1991, p. 171]])
